privileged_info_summary: The task requires importing a synthetically generated bookmark HTML file located at /home/ga/Documents/research_bookmarks.html. The generated file expects four specific imported folders: 'Digital Archives', 'Press Freedom Organizations', 'Academic Resources', and 'Tor Network Resources'. The agent must then create a new bookmark folder named exactly 'Censorship Research' and add a bookmark inside it with the exact title 'PEN America - Literary Freedom'.
